flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Carl Albert State College are 11% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.1k vs $38.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Carl Albert State College fell 86% between 2021 and 2024 (73.9% → 10.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 50% at Carl Albert State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.2k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Carl Albert State College rose 39% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.8k → $9.4k).
